title: P27 Sqrt-Beating Test Queue After Coupling Kill

killed: Dplus as an expensive independent classifier

tests.name: a_level_kummer_sequence_extraction
tests.question: Are d3,d4,d5,... pullbacks, translates, coboundaries, iterates, or fresh independent half-covers on the normalized A-level surface?
required_outputs: branch divisor degree and support field degrees
d4 class on the d3-plus prefix
first explicit relation or obstruction among d3,d4,d5,d6
tests.promote_if: low-genus/sourceable class or named correspondence controls multiple selected gates source-normalized
tests.kill_if: d3 is high/generic after quotienting and d4/d5/d6 are fresh independent Kummer layers

tests.name: gamma4_gamma5_repeated_kummer_comparison
tests.question: Does the repeated transition F_A(U,V), gamma^2=V+2 reuse a Kummer class or add a fresh half-cover each layer?
required_outputs: normalize selected components of the localized no-R chart
compare div(V+2) and div(Wnext+2) modulo squares
tests.promote_if: gamma4 and gamma5 become related on a low-genus/sourceable quotient or produce a selected-chain sampler
tests.kill_if: gamma4 and gamma5 are unrelated fresh Kummer layers or only yield a sign-word bucket already killed at GPU scale

tests.name: dplus_fused_native_exchange_rate
tests.question: Can Dplus be imposed cheaper than ordinary first-two-gate halving failure?
required_outputs: baseline ordinary raw_y_draws/sec and accepted roots/sec
fused/native Dplus raw_y_draws/sec and accepted roots/sec
tests.promote_if: effective survivor/sec at depth >= 26 improves by >=2x versus baseline and target/source_draw is not worse than the known two-gate denominator
tests.math_promote_if: the fused stream also exposes a later-gate source/recurrent class
tests.kill_if: fused path is slower than ordinary halving or only converts conditional enrichment into classifier cost

tests.name: dplus_to_a_bridge_reconstruction
tests.question: Can Dplus H90/quotient coordinates map cheaply to the A-line coordinate that carries post-Dplus d3/d4?
same_stream_columns: t,w,z or enough trace/norm/H90 coordinates to recover them
required_analysis: try bounded rational reconstruction A = R(t,w,z,eta) or A = R(a,g,z,eta)
compare the induced d3 class with A_eta = U_eta + z*W_eta
record whether the map is low-degree, high-degree/generic, or sheet-dependent
tests.promote_if: low-degree/sourceable map from Dplus H90 coordinates to A-level d3 class or quotient/Prym relation between A_eta and d3
tests.kill_if: no stable bounded-degree map across heldout streams and A-level class remains independent of H90 payload except through ordinary candidate materialization
